description: Zero-Knowledge Context™ & Neural Handover™ for AI Agents. The Trust Layer for AI Memory.
name: io.github.SynapseLayer/synapse-secure-memory

environmentVariables.description: Identifier for the agent using the memory layer (e.g., claude-desktop, my-agent).
environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_AGENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Differential privacy epsilon parameter. Lower values = stronger privacy. Range: 0.1–2.0.
environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_PRIVACY_EPSILON

environmentVariables.description: AES-256-GCM encryption key for at-rest memory encryption. Auto-generated if not provided.
environmentVariables.name: SYNAPSE_ENCRYPTION_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR. Default: INFO.
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Synapse Layer — Zero-Knowledge Memory
